metadata.description: Cross-tool (Claude Code + GitHub Copilot) skills for brainstorming, SDLC, eval-driven development, and repo onboarding.

plugins.name: brainstorm-toolkit
plugins.description: Skills that work across Claude Code and GitHub Copilot, unified by a shared AGENTS.md + TASKS.md contract. Includes ideation (/brainstorm), autonomous delivery (/sdlc), task execution (/task), onboarding (/repo-onboarding), and more.
